task: The plugin page should list the most recent versions first, showing at most 10. Versions are semver strings like "1.9.0". Implement this in version_api.py.
known_issue: Version strings are sorted lexicographically, not numerically: "1.9.0" sorts after "1.10.0", so 1.9.0 is shown as more recent than 1.10.0 and any double-digit component breaks the ordering. The cap then also drops the wrong versions.
expected_correct_fix: Sort on the parsed numeric components: sorted(versions, key=lambda v: tuple(map(int, v.split('.'))), reverse=True)[:10].
